rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (commitment reliability), shows where the draft drifts from it (treating commitment as a soft reward penalty), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the numerical drop in commitment levels).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
